faq.title: Straight answers before you visit the office
faq.description: These are the questions most clients ask first when planning travel, visit visas or overseas work processing.

items.q: Is The Flight Centre IATA certified?
items.a: Yes. The Flight Centre Travel & Tours is an IATA certified travel agency based in Gujranwala, Pakistan. We operate from two offices and have been serving clients for over 20 years.

items.q: Which travel agency in Gujranwala offers Umrah packages?
items.a: The Flight Centre Travel & Tours at Office 36-37 Jinnah Stadium, Gujranwala offers complete Umrah packages including hotel, air ticket, transport and Umrah visa. Call UAN 111-786-788.

items.q: What Umrah package durations are available?
items.a: The Flight Centre offers 15-day, 21-day and 28-day Umrah packages from Pakistan, covering hotel near Haram, return air ticket, Umrah visa, ground transport and Ziyarat.

items.q: Does The Flight Centre book international flights?
items.a: Yes. We provide airline ticket booking for all international and domestic routes. Visit our flight booking portal at www.theflightcentre.pk for online bookings.

items.q: What tour destinations does The Flight Centre cover?
items.a: We offer curated tour packages to Dubai, Malaysia, Thailand, Singapore, Bahrain, Azerbaijan, Oman, Cambodia, Sri Lanka, Iran, Indonesia and 50+ more destinations.

items.q: How do I get a visit visa through The Flight Centre?
items.a: Contact our office with your destination and travel dates. We provide document guidance, application support and processing assistance for all countries.

items.q: Does The Flight Centre offer a B2B portal for travel agents?
items.a: Yes. The Flight Centre offers a web portal ID for travel agencies with same-day activation. Features include multi-user ID support, ticket management and round-the-clock connectivity. Visit agent.tfctours.com.

items.q: What is the UAN number for The Flight Centre?
items.a: The UAN is 111-786-788. You can also call 0304-111-9-786 or reach our 24/7 helpdesk on the same number.

meta.title: About The Flight Centre Travel & Tours | Gujranwala
meta.description: Learn about The Flight Centre Travel & Tours — Gujranwala's IATA certified travel agency with 20+ years of experience in flights, Umrah packages, tours and visa services.

hero.title: Gujranwala's trusted travel agency — licensed, experienced and client-first.
hero.description: The Flight Centre Travel & Tours combines flight bookings, Umrah packages, international tours and visa services under one reliable roof, serving clients across Pakistan for over 20 years.

story.title: Two decades of trusted travel service
paragraphs: The Flight Centre Travel & Tours has been Gujranwala's go-to travel agency for over 20 years. From simple flight bookings to complete Umrah packages and international tours, we handle every travel need with care and professionalism.
As an IATA certified agency, we provide direct access to global airline inventory and maintain strong relationships with hotels, visa authorities and tour operators across 50+ countries.
Our two offices in Gujranwala serve thousands of clients each year, with a 24/7 helpdesk ensuring round-the-clock support for every traveller.

leadership.title: Led by Rana Khalid Parvez Khan
leadership.description: The leadership section is framed to reinforce accountability and hands-on oversight, especially for clients navigating sensitive documentation and cross-border employment cases.

items.title: Licensed handling
items.description: Trust begins with visible license numbers and a clear explanation of what each operational desk covers.

items.title: One-stop coordination
items.description: Tickets, hotel reservations, insurance, visit visas and work processing are presented as connected services rather than disconnected tasks.

items.title: Direct communication
items.description: Calls to action consistently lead to phone, UAN and email touchpoints so the user always knows the next step.

meta.title: Saudi Visa Preparation Guide
meta.description: Read a quick Saudi visa preparation guide covering documents, discussion points and next-step planning before contacting The Flight Centre Travel & Tours.

saudi-visa-guide.title: A simple guide before your Saudi visa conversation begins.
saudi-visa-guide.description: This guide helps clients think clearly about documents, timing and the kind of case they are bringing to the Saudi desk.
checklist: A clear idea of whether the case is visit, work or Wakala related
Any employer, sponsor or file context already in hand

sections.title: Know the purpose of travel
sections.body: Saudi-related applications can differ significantly depending on whether the case is for employment, visit travel or a Wakala-linked process. Clarifying the purpose early helps the agency point you to the right desk.

sections.title: Check document readiness
sections.body: Bring or prepare every document you already have so the team can quickly identify what is complete, what is missing and what may need clarification before the case moves forward.

sections.title: Ask for the next practical step
sections.body: A good first conversation should not feel vague. The goal is to leave knowing the next required document, booking or follow-up point.

saudi-visa-guide.note: Saudi case requirements can vary by file type, so this guide should be treated as a starting point rather than a final checklist.

meta.title: Visit Visa Readiness Guide
meta.description: Prepare for your visit visa discussion with a quick overview of documents, travel intent and supporting details to review before contacting The Flight Centre Travel & Tours.

visit-visa-guide.title: Better visit visa conversations start with better preparation.
visit-visa-guide.description: Use this guide to organise the information that typically shapes the first visit visa discussion with the agency.
visit-visa-guide.checklistTitle: What to think about before you call
checklist: Reason for travel and expected duration of stay
Any financial, host or travel history documents you may need

sections.title: Match documents to destination
sections.body: Not every country asks for the same supporting material. Knowing the destination and travel purpose helps narrow the checklist quickly.

sections.title: Prepare a clean travel story
sections.body: You should be able to explain why you are travelling, how long you expect to stay and what arrangements are already planned.

sections.title: Link the visa to the rest of the trip
sections.body: Visit visa support becomes stronger when the traveller also thinks about flights, hotel reservations and insurance as part of the same planning flow.

visit-visa-guide.note: Final visit visa requirements depend on the country and the traveller’s case, so use this page as an orientation guide.
